parameters.query:
WITH TopRecord AS
(
    SELECT TOP 1 x.Id, x."Type", "Text", MediaLink , MessageGroupedId, x.ChatId
    FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
    JOIN TelegramGroupSource tg ON x.ChatId = tg.ChatId
    WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM XinhDistributionLog xl
        WHERE x.Id = xl.SourceId AND DistributionTarget <> '{{ $json.Link }}'
    )
    --AND "Status"  = 'APPROVED'
    AND MediaLink NOT LIKE 'https://drive.google.com%'
    AND MessageGroupedId IS NULL -- REMOVE THIS LINE LATER
    AND tg.GroupType = '{{ $json.GroupType }}'
    AND x."Type" = 'FileType.PHOTO' -- REMOVE THIS LINE LATER
)
SELECT x.Id, x."Type", x."Text", x.MediaLink, x.MessageGroupedId, ChatId, ca.Credentials
FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
JOIN CommunityAccount ca ON x.DriveAccount = ca."User"
WHERE 
    (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) IS NULL 
    AND x.Id = (SELECT Id FROM TopRecord)
    OR 
    ( x.MessageGroupedId = (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) AND x.ChatId = (SELECT ChatId from TopRecord)  )

SELECT TOP 1 g.Id, g.ChatId, 'https://t.me/' + g.Username as Link, g.Username, b.Token, g.GroupType
FROM TelegramGroups g
JOIN TelegramUserBots b ON g.DistributeBot = b.Username
WHERE g.GroupType = '{{ `XINH` }}'
    AND g.SyncStatus = 'SYNCED'
    AND g.[Type] = 'channel'
    AND (DATEPART(hour, GETDATE()) * 60 + DATEPART(minute, GETDATE())) % g.DistributeIntervalMinute <= {{ 1000 }};

parameters.content: DOWNLOAD FILE AND STORAGE AS BUFFER

parameters.query:
WITH TopRecord AS
(
    SELECT TOP 1 x.Id, x."Type", "Text", MediaLink , MessageGroupedId, x.ChatId
    FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
    JOIN TelegramGroupSource tg ON x.ChatId = tg.ChatId
    WHERE 
    NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM XinhDistributionLog xl
        WHERE x.Id = xl.SourceId AND DistributionTarget <> '{{ `` }}'
    )
    --AND "Status"  = 'APPROVED'
    AND MediaLink NOT LIKE 'https://drive.google.com%'
    AND MessageGroupedId IS NULL -- REMOVE THIS LINE LATER
    AND tg.GroupType = '{{ `XINH` }}'
    AND x."Type" = 'FileType.PHOTO' AND x.Id > 42775 -- REMOVE THIS LINE LATER
)
SELECT x.Id, x."Type", x."Text", x.MediaLink, x.MessageGroupedId, ChatId, ca.Credentials
FROM XinhTelegramMedia x
JOIN CommunityAccount ca ON x.DriveAccount = ca."User"
WHERE 
    (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) IS NULL 
    AND x.Id = (SELECT Id FROM TopRecord)
    OR 
    ( x.MessageGroupedId = (SELECT MessageGroupedId FROM TopRecord) AND x.ChatId = (SELECT ChatId from TopRecord)  )
